title: rubus carduelis
intro: Rubus carduelis, also known as the Bird Cherry or May Cherry, is a species of flowering plant in the rose family that is native to Europe and Western Asia. The medicinal properties of Rubus carduelis include its use as a laxative and its ability to treat fever, rheumatism, and skin conditions due to its astringent and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of this plant include its potential to reduce inflammation, improve digestion, and support the immune system. Rubus carduelis can be prepared as a herbal tea, infusion, or tincture, which can be used to treat various health issues.
